meta.title: Mama's Heart — Made with Love
meta.description: Mama's Heart creates expert-designed educational toys for children ages 4–6, made with love to support creativity, learning, and joyful development.
meta.ogDescription: Discover educational toys for ages 4–6 designed by mothers and backed by child development experts.

hero.title: Award-Winning Coding Products for Kids Aged 3+
hero.subtitle: Mama's Heart creates educational toys that nurture the curious, creative minds of children aged 4–6 — designed by mothers, backed by experts, made with love.

bookPromo.title: Get your FREE copy with Every Purchase
bookPromo.subtitle: A concise parenting guidebook with child-development tips is included in every order.

packagingPromo.subtitle: Every order arrives in keepsake-ready packaging made to delight little learners and their families.

why.title: Toys made from the heart
why.subtitle: Every Mama's Heart toy is crafted to support your child's development naturally — turning everyday play into meaningful milestones.

experts.title: Developed with Child Experts
experts.description: Our toys are co-created with early childhood psychologists to hit exactly the right developmental targets for ages 4–6.

safe.title: Safe & Sustainable
safe.description: Non-toxic, BPA-free, and made from sustainably sourced wood and recycled materials — safe for your child and the planet.

built.title: Built by Mamas
built.description: Our founding team are mothers themselves. Every product passes the ultimate test: would we give this to our own children?

grows.title: Grows With Your Child
grows.description: Progressive challenge levels keep each toy fresh and stimulating as your little one develops new skills every month.

sarah.text: "My daughter asks for the Little Artist Set every single morning. I've never seen her so focused and happy at the same time."

jessica.text: "The Little Explorer Set was the best birthday gift we ever gave. He spent the whole day in the garden discovering bugs!"

amanda.text: "As a teacher and a mother, I recommend Mama's Heart to every family I know. The care in every toy is genuinely felt."

cta.title: Give your child the gift of joyful learning
cta.subtitle: Join over 12,000 families who have made playtime smarter, more meaningful, and full of love — with Mama's Heart.

newsletter.title: Join the Mama's Heart family ♡
newsletter.subtitle: Get activity ideas, parenting tips, and exclusive offers — delivered with love.

footer.description: Educational toys for curious little minds aged 4–6. Designed by mothers, backed by experts.

chat.title: Ask Mama
